assertions.description: navigator.serviceWorker is exposed in the global scope.
navigator.serviceWorker.register is a function, allowing registration of service workers.
The page is loaded in a secure context (HTTPS or loopback), as required for service workers and Local Network Access restrictions.
navigator.permissions.query({name:'local-network'}) resolves successfully, indicating support for Local Network Access permission querying.
WindowClient.prototype.navigate is exposed as a function inside the service worker scope.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator))return false;const s='self.addEventListener("message",e=>{if(e.data.action==="probe"&&e.ports&&e.ports[0]){const h=typeof WindowClient!=="undefined";const n=h&&typeof WindowClient.prototype.navigate==="function";e.ports[0].postMessage({type:"probe-result",ok:n});}});';const b=new Blob([s],{type:'application/javascript'});const u=URL.createObjectURL(b);let r;try{r=await navigator.serviceWorker.register(u);const res=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const c=new MessageChannel();c.port1.onmessage=e=>{if(e.data.type==='probe-result')resolve(e.data.ok);};const send=()=>{const w=r.active||r.installing||r.waiting;if(w)w.postMessage({action:'probe'},[c.port2]);else setTimeout(send,50);};send();setTimeout(()=>reject(new Error('timeout')),2000);});return res;}catch(_){return false;}finally{if(r)await r.unregister();URL.revokeObjectURL(u);}})()

assertions.description: Client.prototype.postMessage is exposed as a function in the service worker scope, enabling the postMessage-based fallback pattern.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!('serviceWorker'in navigator))return false;const s='self.addEventListener("message",e=>{if(e.data.action==="probe"&&e.ports&&e.ports[0]){const h=typeof Client!=="undefined";const p=h&&typeof Client.prototype.postMessage==="function";e.ports[0].postMessage({type:"probe-result",ok:p});}});';const b=new Blob([s],{type:'application/javascript'});const u=URL.createObjectURL(b);let r;try{r=await navigator.serviceWorker.register(u);const res=await new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const c=new MessageChannel();c.port1.onmessage=e=>{if(e.data.type==='probe-result')resolve(e.data.ok);};const send=()=>{const w=r.active||r.installing||r.waiting;if(w)w.postMessage({action:'probe'},[c.port2]);else setTimeout(send,50);};send();setTimeout(()=>reject(new Error('timeout')),2000);});return res;}catch(_){return false;}finally{if(r)await r.unregister();URL.revokeObjectURL(u);}})()
